description: The ``Render To Texture Asset`` node takes in a provided Camera, resolution, file format, and quality for the texture. Then this node will attempt to render it into a texture, and returns the asset URL for the world to use.

fields.* ([[Impulses|AsyncCall]]): Calls an impulse to render a texture.
fields.Camera: The camera used to render the texture.
fields.Format: The texture asset file format (defaults to ``webp``).
fields.Quality: The quality of the texture asset (default to ``200``).
fields.OnRenderStarted: Fires when this rendering task has started.
fields.OnRendered: Fires when this rendering task has finished rendering.
fields.OnFailed: Fires when this rendering task has failed.
fields.RenderedAssetURL: The Uri asset of the texture.
